scenario: Design an inference pipeline for a camera app that maintains 60 FPS preview while running a 50ms portrait segmentation model. The model cannot run every frame. How do you architect this so the user sees smooth video with accurate segmentation?

title: The Hidden Broadcast Receiver Wake-Ups
